# Smartflow API

> Cross-protocol smart wallet tracking. Aggregate PNL, ROI, and capital flow signals across protocol leaderboards.

## API Base

https://alidashboard.up.railway.app
OpenAPI spec: GET /api/openapi

## Global Endpoints (no auth required)

### GET /api/top-pnl
Returns highest PNL wallets aggregated across all integrated protocols.
Parameters: limit (int, 1-100, default 10)
Use case: Identify top-performing wallets across all tracked protocols.

## f(x) Protocol Endpoints (no auth required)

### GET /api/fx/top-pnl
Returns highest PNL wallets from the f(x) Protocol leaderboard.
Parameters: limit (int, 1-100, default 10)
Use case: Identify top-performing traders within f(x) Protocol.

### GET /api/fx/status
Returns protocol overview: tracked wallets, winners, win rates, volume, PNL, ROI.
No parameters required.
Use case: Quick snapshot of f(x) Protocol leaderboard health.

### GET /api/fx/fxusd-rate
Returns latest and historical fxUSD borrow APR.
Parameters: maWindow (int, default 30), limit (int, optional)
Use case: Check current fxUSD borrow cost before opening a leveraged position.

## Cross-Protocol Rates (no auth required)

### GET /api/rates
Returns full lending rate data across protocols (Aave, CrvUSD, fxUSD).
Parameters: maWindow (int, optional), fallback (string, optional)
Use case: Compare borrow rates across DeFi protocols.

## Premium Endpoints (x402 payment required — $0.01 USDC)

### GET /api/premium
Returns premium f(x) Protocol leaderboard metrics: top traders by PNL and ROI.
Auth: x402 USDC payment → session cookie.
Use case: Deep analytics on top-performing f(x) Protocol wallets.

### POST /api/x402/session-token
Initiates x402 checkout flow for premium access.

## Authentication

Public and f(x) Protocol endpoints require no authentication.
Premium endpoints use x402 protocol: pay $0.01 USDC per call on Base network.

## Data Sources

- f(x) Protocol leaderboard API (live snapshots)
- The Graph (fxUSD funding data)
- Google Apps Script feed (FX volume trends)

## Coming Soon

- **Perp DEX**: endpoints at `/api/perp/...`
- **Meme Coins**: endpoints at `/api/meme/...`

## Machine-Readable Specs

- OpenAPI 3.1: /api/openapi
- Plugin manifest: /.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- Agent descriptor: /agents.json
